The '''''Rampage''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was capable of carrying 72 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].

{{Ship-stub}}
